global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with geometric shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting financial clarity and peace of mind with VaultRun.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The text 'VaultRun' is displayed prominently at the top in a bold, modern font, likely in white or light color for contrast.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large, semi-transparent circle and rectangle are centered in the ad, overlapping slightly, creating a modern and abstract visual.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Additional geometric shapes are layered in the center, adding depth and interest to the design.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The text 'Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind' is centered in a large, clear font, conveying the ad's main message.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in the top right corner reads 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching text, likely in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button at the bottom of the ad says 'Watch now' in a clear, inviting font, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Sale icon
elements.description: The 'SALE' text is set against a contrasting background, making it stand out as a promotional element.
